stream_a.title: Midrex is to build a DRI production plant for US Steel
stream_a.summary: Midrex has signed a contract with US Steel to supply a Midrex process complex with a capacity of 2.5 million tonnes per year. The new direct reduced iron (DRI) production facility will be built at the Big River Steel Works steel plant in Arkansas. Production is scheduled to commence in 2029. stream_a.title: Gradual phase-in of ETS auctions offers best route to decarbonise China’s power sector -study
stream_a.summary: China should gradually expand carbon allowance auctions and tighten emissions caps in its national ETS rather than pursue an aggressive reform pathway, according to a modelling study published this week that warns rapid changes could destabilise domestic CO2 prices and threaten power system reliability.

stream_b.title: 畜牧糞尿變黃金！彰化福寶生質能中心打造環保與循環經濟新典範
stream_b.summary: 彰化縣是全台最大酪農產區，畜牧糞尿處理是重要環境課題，位在福興鄉的福寶生質能資源化處理中心26日將揭牌啟用，透過畜牧糞尿集中處理及沼氣發電技術，每日可處理660立方公尺畜牧糞尿，預估每年發電量達280萬度，除改善畜牧廢水問題及減少排碳1327公噸，成為循環經濟與綠能發展的新典範。

stream_b.title: Indonesia’s growing truck fleet could lock in diesel demand for decades, report warns
stream_b.summary: Indonesia could slash freight emissions, cut its dependence on imported diesel, and save money in fuel subsidies by electrifying its truck fleet, but high upfront costs and limited charging infrastructure risk locking Southeast Asia’s largest economy into decades of diesel use, according to a new report.

stream_b.title: India proposes risk buffer for nature-based projects under offset scheme, seeks input
stream_b.summary: India has launched a consultation on draft rules that would allow nature-based carbon projects into its emerging carbon market, proposing a risk-buffer system for forest, wetland, mangrove, and soil carbon activities.

stream_b.title: 總統公布《資源循環推動法》 循環署給兩年緩衝 揭未來推動方向
EU ETS expansion would add less than 1% to some long-haul fares while raising billions for climate action – report
stream_b.summary: Extending the EU’s carbon market to cover all flights departing the European Economic Area (EEA) would have only a marginal impact on airfares and passenger demand, while generating billions of euros annually for climate action, according to a new study commissioned by Carbon Market Watch (CMW).

stream_b.title: 花蓮馬太鞍溪上游現新堰塞湖、嘉義熱傷害風險全台最高、日韓研究稱沒人種田比氣候影響更嚴重
stream_b.summary: 新店社區邊坡坍塌釀車輛墜落 勘查發現含大量回填土 最近的午後大雨等影響，部分縣市都發生土石崩落。18日晚上，在新北市新店的一處社區外，還造成5輛汽機車滑落，專家進一步勘驗後發現，現場的土質脆弱，含有許多的回填土，市府預估3天時間，將鋼軌樁加裝完成，強化支撐。而在基隆通明街，則是有大量土石灌入住家，砸毀停在車庫的汽車，幸好無人受傷。（ 公視新聞網 報導） 花蓮馬太鞍溪上游又出現新堰塞湖 農業部空中觀測監控 今年第7號颱風米克拉20日生成，目前持續增強中，農業部林業及自然保育署航測及遙測分署今天派遙測飛機前往花蓮馬太鞍溪上游執行定期監測任務，發現北邊萬里溪上游有一處新增堰塞湖，概略位置約在原馬太鞍溪大崩塌地北方7公里處，由於位置比過去馬太鞍溪堰塞湖更為深山、無路徑可達，林保署花蓮分署將申請空勘調查、研究分析大小，將以最快速度解析堰塞湖大小。（ 自由時報 報導） 北市豪雨釀91件災情 台灣大學4

stream_b.title: Brazil regulates payments for ecosystem services
stream_b.summary: Brazil has issued long-awaited regulations governing the country’s national policy on payments for ecosystem services (PES), establishing rules for both public and private initiatives.

stream_b.title: Amazon NbS fund concludes deployment of R$250 mln into carbon pipeline
stream_b.summary: A R$250-million ($48.7 mln) nature finance vehicle has completed its investment period after fully deploying capital across its portfolio of 11 nature-based solutions (NbS) in the Brazilian Amazon, according to a report published this week.
